gates.title: Brain requires evidence before stateful answers
evidence_required: src/pre_answer_router.py adds live_state_claim with evidence-required gap injection
src/pre_answer_runtime.py routes live_state_claim to deep budget
src/guardian_config.py and src/presets/guardian_default.json make R34/R37 hard core rules
tests/test_pre_answer_router.py and tests/test_runtime_budget_policy.py cover evidence and gap paths

gates.title: Desktop preloads continuity tools and preserves verification gaps
evidence_required: prompts/system/conversation-bootstrap.md preloads pre-answer and continuity tools
lib/pre-answer-router-client.js detects live_state_claim and keeps defer/gap metadata
tests/pre-answer-router-client.test.js and tests/conversation-bootstrap.test.js cover detection, preload, and generic gap injection

gates.title: Task closeout and release discipline gates are stricter
evidence_required: src/hooks/stop.py blocks future commitments or partial closes without followups
src/plugins/protocol.py blocks total/no-debt language with open work, pending release gates, irreversible actions without specific approval, and live-state fixes without live verification
src/enforcement_engine.py and src/hooks/post_tool_use.py enforce clearer first responses and production change logging

gates.title: Local Context query use is recorded in the real usage store
evidence_required: src/local_context/api.py records query usage through local_context.usage_events without mutating the read-only sidecar
src/local_context/health.py reports the usage-store query counter with legacy counter evidence

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.31.7
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page and sitemap reference v7.31.7
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.31.7
release-contracts/smoke/v7.31.7.json records the focused Brain/Desktop validation commands
